overall.description: A foggy nighttime walk through a residential city street in a video game environment (GTA V style). The camera moves along wet sidewalks, crosses an intersection, and continues down the road as a black sedan passes by under streetlights.

events.description: passes the parked white sedan on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a foggy intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked at the curb, stationary

entered.detail: tall streetlight illuminating the foggy atmosphere
multi-story residential building with lit windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk at night, passing tropical bushes on the left and a parked white sedan on the right. A tall streetlamp pierces through the fog ahead, with a residential apartment building visible in the background.

events.description: steps from sidewalk onto the street crosswalk
continues crossing the intersection toward the opposite side

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, moving from sidewalk to road

entered.detail: octagonal stop sign on a metal pole at the intersection corner
painted white zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
white STOP text painted on the road surface

segments.scene_description: Crossing the foggy intersection on white crosswalk stripes, with a stop sign visible on the left. The streetlamp shifts to the left as the camera moves through the wide open intersection, leaving the sidewalk vegetation behind.

events.description: black sedan approaches with headlights visible through the fog
black sedan passes by on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking along the road edge as a vehicle approaches and passes

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving toward and passing the camera, headlights illuminating the fog

entered.detail: row of trees lining the far side of the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the residential street as a black sedan approaches through the fog with bright headlights, passing by on the left. The stop sign and crosswalk are left behind as the camera moves past the intersection, with trees now lining the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy residential neighborhood at night, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk to an open street intersection. It begins by gliding along a concrete walkway past tropical bushes and a parked white sedan, with a distant apartment building looming behind a piercing streetlamp. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the perspective shifts across white crosswalk stripes and past a stop sign. The view then expands further down the residential road, leaving the intersection behind as a black sedan with bright headlights emerges from the fog to pass on the left. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory, moving away from the urban crossing toward a stretch of road lined with trees.
